## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Related Issues
- Closes #

## Scope of Changes
- [ ] API
- [ ] Domain
- [ ] Application
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Workers

## Validation
List commands run and key results.

```bash
dotnet build
dotnet test
```

## Evidence
Include output snippets, screenshots, or sample requests/responses when relevant.

## Checklist
- [ ] Changes are focused and aligned with issue scope
- [ ] Documentation updated if behavior/architecture changed
- [ ] Tests added/updated for relevant behavior
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
